## Summary

## Change Type
- [ ] Rust code
- [ ] CI / GitHub Actions
- [ ] Release / container
- [ ] Docs / governance

## Verification
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-targets --all-features`
- [ ] Additional checks run:

## Impact
- [ ] Behavior changed
- [ ] Release flow changed
- [ ] Security or permissions changed
- [ ] Docs updated when needed
